description: Schema for a student's existing knowledge profile, passed into generate_study_plan.

fields.known_topics: list[str] - topics the student is already comfortable with, e.g. ['recursion', 'arrays']
fields.weak_topics: list[str] - topics the student has struggled with, e.g. ['dynamic programming']
fields.goal: str - what the student is preparing for, e.g. 'new-grad SWE interviews' or 'CS 3683 final exam'
fields.days_until_goal: int - number of days until the interview/exam/deadline
